name: Pixel Knock Grid Generator
desc: Upload an image and generate a 3D printable pixel grid STL for pixel craft blocks. All processing runs locally in your browser.
description: Upload an image and generate a 3D printable pixel grid STL for pixel craft blocks. All processing runs locally in your browser.

whatIsThis.en: Pixel Knock Grid Generator turns an image into a 3D printable pixel grid for hands-on craft projects. It runs locally in your browser, creates a no-base STL grid, and calculates the required block count for each color group.
whatIsThis.zh: 敲敲乐网格生成器是一款适合 3D 打印和手工拼搭的图片转网格工具。上传图片后，工具会在浏览器本地将图片转换成敲敲乐网格，并生成可用于 3D 打印的 STL 文件，同时统计每种颜色需要准备的颗粒数量。适合制作儿童手工、像素画、亲子活动材料包和 3D 打印创意作品。

en: Upload a PNG, JPG, or WEBP image.
Adjust grid count, max colors, cell size, wall thickness, and wall height.
Remove near-white background, trim empty edges, and generate a preview.
Review required blocks, color groups, and overall frame size.
Download the STL grid, PNG preview, CSV color list, or the complete project ZIP.
zh: 上传 PNG、JPG 或 WEBP 图片。
调整网格数、最大颜色数、单格尺寸、墙厚和墙高。
勾选去除白底、裁剪空白边缘，生成预览图。
查看所需颗粒数、颜色组和外框总尺寸。
下载网格 STL、PNG 预览图、颜色清单 CSV，或下载完整项目 ZIP。
